name: Fresh Apple Bread (Bobbie Cohen)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Sift together the first five ingredients and set aside.
3. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir in dry ingredients half at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Add apple mixture and fold in nuts.
7. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9 x 5 x 3-inch loaf pan.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour or until done.
9. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then turn out onto a wire rack. Cool completely before slicing.
Yield: 1 loaf.
